title: read_in_order_use_virtual_row SEGV
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
See simple repro
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
Tested on 25.7, 25.3 using clickhouse-client.
```
CREATE TABLE tbl (
a UInt64,
b UInt64
)
ENGINE = MergeTree()
ORDER BY (a, b)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;
INSERT INTO tbl SELECT number, number FROM numbers(81920);
SELECT
a,
b
FROM tbl
ORDER BY (a, b)
SETTINGS read_in_order_use_virtual_row = 1;
```
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl1 (id INTEGER, value VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO tbl1 SELECT number, CAST(number % 10 AS VARCHAR) FROM range(100);
CREATE TABLE tbl2 (ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR, amount DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO tbl2 SELECT id, 'Description ' || CAST(id AS VARCHAR), id * 1.5 FROM tbl1;
SELECT tbl1.id, tbl2.amount FROM tbl1 JOIN tbl2 ON tbl1.id = tbl2.ref_id WHERE tbl1.value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tbl1.id;
